title: Corporate Financing Decisions: What are the implications of the trade-off theory of capital...
summary: Explain the trade-off theory balancing tax benefits of debt against bankruptcy costs.
prompt: What are the implications of the trade-off theory of capital structure?

options.text: Step 2: Recognize that it suggests an optimal capital structure exists

solution:
Step 1: Define the trade-off theory, which posits that firms seek to balance the tax benefits of debt against the costs of potential bankruptcy.
Step 2: Recognize that it suggests an optimal capital structure exists where the marginal benefit of debt equals its marginal cost.
Step 3: Conclude that B correctly reflects this balancing act, making it the right choice.
